title: Forepath Extension Provider Generator
description: Scaffold a domain provider library with forepath.extension.json and extension stubs

domain.x-prompt: Which domain is this provider for?

name.description: Short provider name (e.g. stripe, cursor, chat-filter-noop)
name.x-prompt: What name would you like to use?

kind.description: Extension kind constant for the domain plugin-host
kind.x-prompt: What extension kind does this provider implement?

description.x-prompt: Optional description for the extension manifest
